description: Fetch episode metadata (titles, descriptions) from TMDb episode groups for better organization of multi-season series with alternate episode orders such as DVD order or production order.
name: TMDb Episode Groups
overview: Use TMDb episode groups to organize and fetch episode metadata

versions.changelog:
- Initial release of TMDb Episode Groups plugin
- Configure episode groups per series via the dashboard
- Episode group ID is written directly to series metadata
- In-memory cache with configurable TTL to reduce TMDB API calls
- Manual cache refresh via dashboard or API endpoints
